headline: Did Philip Morris Backing Ferrari’s Hypersail Project Just Shift Philip Morris International's (PM) Investment Narrative?
summary: In April 2026, Philip Morris International announced it will serve as Principal Partner of Ferrari Hypersail, backing a 30-meter, fully foiling, renewable-energy-powered ocean racing monohull that will showcase a new external expression of PMI’s evolving visual identity. This collaboration reinforces PMI’s push to position itself as a science- and innovation-led consumer packaged goods company, extending its smoke-free transformation narrative beyond tobacco into high-tech,...

headline: A Look At Philip Morris International’s Valuation As Smoke Free Shift And Partnerships Gain Traction
summary: Philip Morris International (PM) has drawn fresh investor attention after smoke free products reached 41.5% of revenue and the company announced a new role as Principal Partner of Ferrari Hypersail. See our latest analysis for Philip Morris International. Despite a series of announcements around smoke free growth, U.S. expansion and the Ferrari Hypersail partnership, Philip Morris International’s 1 month share price return of 5.03% and 90 day share price return of 9.12% contrast with a 3 year...
